deterministic_setup.reason: com.sun.jersey:jersey-core:1.14 declares this as its provided OSGi API dependency, and it contains org.osgi.framework.BundleReference required by com.sun.jersey.core.osgi.OsgiRegistry.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8875 [Automation] java run fails for com.sun.jersey:jersey-core:1.14; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 1.9 scaffold already includes org.osgi:osgi_R4_core:1.0, which lacks BundleReference; keeping both OSGi API jars may duplicate org.osgi.framework classes, so local Gradle verification is authoritative.
Jersey Core also has provided JavaMail/JAXB APIs used by some provider coverage; the existing scaffold already supplies those, but dropping them during regeneration could reduce reachable coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Jersey Core 1.14 changed its provided OSGi API dependency from the old osgi_R4_core artifact to org.osgi.core 4.2.0; OSGi coverage now reaches org.osgi.framework.BundleReference, which is absent from the existing scaffold dependency.
